description: FIND-012 of the behavioral spec states: 'TagFilterSidebar is rendered as a separate component in the +page.svelte layout, inside the <aside class="feed-sidebar"> element, before <FeedList>'. The actual implementation renders TagFilterSidebar INSIDE FeedList.svelte's template (line 263), not as a separate component in +page.svelte. While functionally similar, this deviates from the documented architecture and means TagFilterSidebar cannot receive independent props from +page.svelte — it relies on FeedList to compute and pass tag inventory.
